title: Managed block update strategy
objective: Implement a managed-block update strategy for shared files such as AGENTS.md, README.md, Makefile, and workflow files.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Define a managed block marker format such as BEGIN META-HARNESS MANAGED BLOCK / END META-HARNESS MANAGED BLOCK.
Implement replacement only inside matching managed blocks while preserving user-owned content outside the block.
Fail safely when block markers are missing, duplicated, or nested incorrectly.
Integrate managed-block decisions with manifest.lock mergeStrategy.
Add tests for block replacement, missing marker, duplicated marker, and user-owned content preservation.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: 사용자 수정 파일과 생성 파일을 충돌 없이 갱신하는 managed block 전략을 구현한다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
